storylets.title: {=patron_contract_title}{LORD_NAME} has need again
storylets.setup: {=patron_contract_setup}{LORD_NAME} hears you out, then pulls a folded dispatch from his belt pouch. "Convenient. There is a thing. Not a war thing — a thing for someone with hands. The pay would be soldier's pay, the trouble worse. Will you take it?"

options.text: {=patron_contract_name_terms}Tell me the work and the silver, lord, and I'll decide.
options.tooltip: {=patron_contract_name_terms_tt}Patron offers a contract; payout adjusted for negotiation. +1 calculating.

options.text: {=patron_contract_trust}I'll take it, lord. The terms can wait.
options.tooltip: {=patron_contract_trust_tt}Patron names a generous purse for the trust. +2500 denars, +5 patron relation.

options.text: {=patron_contract_decline}Not this time, lord. The road is mine.
options.tooltip: {=patron_contract_decline_tt}+3 relation. Patron folds the dispatch back into his belt.
